title: Rudra Srivastava returns to Dua Associates as Partner in Corporate practice
description: Rudra Srivastava has re-joined Dua Associates as a Partner in Corporate practice at the firm's Gurugram office.Srivastava is a 2006 alumnus of National Law Institute University, Bhopal.Srivastava brings nearly two decades of experience to the Firm. He has developed a robust practice that spans Transaction Advisory, including Mergers & Acquisitions, Private Equity, and Joint Ventures, as well as General Corporate and Commercial advisory, Labour and Employment, and Real Estate.
